message:
fix(eviction): close RemoteCap validation gaps in saga crash recovery and phase transitions

connector/eviction_saga.rs:
- Fix crash recovery from Compensating phase: correctly finish
  compensation flow by calling compensation_complete() and returning
  stored action instead of leaving saga stuck
- Fix RemoteCap recheck logic: change condition from requiring both
  existing flag AND new check to just checking has_remote_cap, then
  explicitly setting remote_cap_validated=true. Prevents dead-end state
  where restored capability could not re-validate after prior invalidation
- Add upload_complete_allows_retry_after_remote_cap_restored test
- Add crash_recovery_from_compensating_completes_aborted test

remote/eviction_saga.rs:
- Add ensure_remote_cap_active() gate to complete_retire transition,
  closing gap where retirement could complete without valid capability
- Add test_remote_cap_recheck_blocks_complete_verify_until_restored test
- Add test_remote_cap_recheck_blocks_complete_retire_until_restored test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
